3100660.name: Firefighter Wizard: The Elemental Order
3100660.description:
FireFighterWizard is a third-person action-adventure game built around a stylized firefighting. An unseen natural disaster is about to turn the once peaceful fantasy land into a fiery inferno. Try yourself in a role of a firefighting wizard who uses the power of magic to save people, douse burning cities, and traverse treacherous wildlands.

  • Fiery Battles
    Use your magic and sharp mind in immersive and unpredictable battles against fire forces of nature.
  • Open World
    Explore a fantasy land in search of magical items, forgotten trails, and ancient ruins.
  • Rich Story
    Talk to inhabitants of the land, search written sources. Learn about the world and look for clues to stop the disaster.
  • Make Safer World
    Save people from immediate dangers and clean up the consequences of the disaster.
